Use these Tailwind CSS FAQ examples to share answers to common questions that visitors might have after browsing your website. These FAQ examples are designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team, and include a variety of different styles and layouts.

faqTextSamples: UI Dictionary
UI Blocks
FAQs
자주 묻는 질문과 짧은 답변을 섹션 안에서 빠르게 확인하게 하는 FAQ 섹션 예시입니다.
Tailwind Plus처럼 각 leaf의 첫 예제는 Preview와 Code를 함께 제공하고, 이후 예제는 Preview와 잠금 code CTA로 구분합니다. 우리 예시는 실제 화면 맥락에 맞춘 설명, tags, interaction feedback을 함께 보여줍니다.
On this page
Offset with supporting text
왼쪽에는 설명을, 오른쪽에는 질문 목록을 둬 FAQ의 맥락을 먼저 알려줍니다.
Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our customer support team.
Start from the user's next action. Compare the examples, then choose the pattern whose states and feedback match that workflow.
Yes. Each page names the pattern, explains the anatomy, and gives enough constraints for an implementation prompt.
Static screenshots miss state changes. The examples show what happens after clicking, selecting, opening, dismissing, or submitting.
The navigation, preview/code rhythm, and leaf-page density follow Tailwind's structure, while the copy and examples are adapted to this site.
Check the sidebar category, the first preview, the active state, and the On this page list before copying a pattern.
